title: Disynaphia calyculata
taxonomy: Disynaphia calyculata is a species of flowering plant in the family Compositae, also known as Asteraceae. It belongs to the order Asterales and the class Magnoliopsida. As a member of the Compositae family, Disynaphia calyculata is also related to other flowering plants with composite flowers. The plant's classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the same family. Disynaphia calyculata's classification is further supported by its shared characteristics with other species in the same order and class.
